description_long: This object is a modern shotgun with a streamlined, angular design and a matte finish. It features a prominent, boxy magazine located just in front of the trigger guard, suggesting a detachable magazine-fed mechanism. The stock is solid and straight, extending back in a single piece, while the fore-end is flat and squared off, lacking any visible pump or lever. The barrel is relatively short and cylindrical, with simple iron sights mounted on top. The trigger guard is large and rectangular, providing ample space for gloved fingers and offering a robust, utilitarian appearance.
description: A matte-finished, magazine-fed shotgun with a solid stock, short barrel, and a large rectangular trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, boxy magazine, solid stock, and squared fore-end.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features with clear visibility of the magazine and stock.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the flat upper surface, sight alignment, and overall width.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rectangular, large, and elongated with a robust, squared profile
